heading: Data Management Consulting
subheading: Building Reliable, Governed, and Scalable Data Foundations for Modern Enterprises
content:
Iseyon helps organizations establish strong data management frameworks that ensure data accuracy, consistency, security, and accessibility. Poor data quality costs organizations [$12.9 million per year on average](https://www.gartner.com/en/documents/3987586), according to Gartner (2021). A [recent IDC study](https://www.idc.com/) found that 80% of data scientists spend more time on data preparation than on actual analysis, highlighting the critical importance of well-governed data foundations for AI and analytics success. The global Master Data Management (MDM) market is projected to reach [$27.9 billion by 2027](https://www.marketsandmarkets.com/Market-Reports/master-data-management-market-1223.html), growing at a 22.3% CAGR (MarketsandMarkets, 2023).

> "Organizations that treat data as a strategic asset and manage it with the same rigor as financial assets consistently outperform peers on analytics ROI, regulatory compliance, and operational efficiency."
> -- Gartner Research, [Data and Analytics Strategy](https://www.gartner.com/en/data-analytics/topics/data-strategy), 2024

According to [Forrester Research](https://www.forrester.com/research/data-governance/), organizations with mature data governance frameworks achieve 23% faster time-to-insight from analytics investments and are [1.7x more likely to report year-over-year revenue growth](https://www.experian.com/business/resources/data-quality-white-papers) than organizations without structured governance. [NIST SP 800-53 (Security and Privacy Controls)](https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/SpecialPublications/NIST.SP.800-53r5.pdf) provides the regulatory baseline that Iseyon applies when designing data security and governance frameworks for enterprise environments.

> "Data governance is not a compliance checkbox -- it is the operating model that makes every downstream analytics, AI, and business intelligence initiative possible. Without it, organizations are building on sand."
> -- Forrester Research, [Data Governance and Management Report](https://www.forrester.com/report/the-state-of-data-management-and-governance/), 2024

#### **Data Strategy and Governance Framework**

Iseyon defines comprehensive data management strategies aligned with business objectives. Iseyon's governance frameworks establish clear ownership, policies, standards, and controls to ensure data quality, compliance, and accountability across the organization.

#### **Master Data Management (MDM)**

Additionally, Iseyon designs and implements master data solutions that create a single, trusted source of truth for critical business entities such as customers, products, and suppliers. Iseyon's MDM frameworks improve consistency, reduce duplication, and enhance cross-functional collaboration.

#### **Data Quality and Standardization**

Iseyon implements data profiling, cleansing, validation, and standardization processes to ensure high data accuracy and reliability. Iseyon quality solutions improve operational efficiency and enable confident decision-making based on trusted data.

#### **Data Architecture and Integration**

Iseyon designs scalable and flexible data architectures that support seamless integration across systems, applications, and platforms. Using modern integration tools and APIs, Iseyon ensures smooth data flow across enterprise environments.

#### **Metadata Management and Lineage**

Iseyon implements metadata management solutions to provide visibility into data definitions, usage, and lineage. This enhances transparency, auditability, and regulatory compliance while enabling better data discovery and collaboration.

#### **Data Security and Compliance**

Iseyon establishes enterprise-grade security frameworks, including access controls, encryption, and monitoring. Iseyon solutions ensure regulatory compliance and protect sensitive data across on-premise and cloud environments.

#### **Data Lifecycle Management**

Iseyon defines policies for data retention, archival, and disposal to optimize storage costs and maintain compliance. Iseyon's lifecycle management strategies ensure data remains accessible, secure, and relevant throughout its lifespan.

#### **Cloud and Hybrid Data Management**

Iseyon supports data management across cloud, hybrid, and on-premise environments. Iseyon solutions ensure consistency, governance, and scalability regardless of infrastructure strategy.

#### **Modernization and Optimization**

Iseyon helps organizations modernize legacy data systems and implement automation to improve performance, reduce operational complexity, and enhance overall data efficiency -- creating a future-ready data management ecosystem.

### Cost of Poor Data Quality: Business Domain Impact Framework

Framework based on Gartner (2021) and Forrester Data Governance Report (2024):

| Business Domain | Common Data Issue | Annual Business Impact | Recommended Mitigation |
|---|---|---|---|
| Finance and Accounting | Duplicate records, reconciliation errors | Part of avg 12.9M cost (Gartner, 2021) | Master Data Management plus quality rules |
| Customer Data | Inconsistent IDs, stale contact records | Lost revenue, compliance exposure | Golden record management |
| Supply Chain | Inaccurate SKU and inventory data | Stockouts, overstock, write-offs | Real-time validation pipelines |
| Regulatory Compliance | Missing lineage, audit gaps | Fines, reputational damage | Metadata and lineage tracking |
| Analytics and BI | Bad source data driving bad decisions | Strategic misalignment | Data quality scorecards |

*Framework based on Gartner data quality cost research (2021) and Forrester Data Governance and Management Report (2024).*

faqs.question: What Data Management Consulting services does Iseyon provide?
faqs.answer: In short, Iseyon delivers comprehensive data management consulting services including data strategy development, governance framework implementation, master data management (MDM), data quality improvement, architecture design, integration, security, lifecycle management, and modernization. We help organizations transform fragmented data environments into structured, governed, and high-performing ecosystems that support analytics and AI initiatives.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon establish a strong data governance framework?
faqs.answer: Iseyon defines enterprise-wide governance strategies that include clear data ownership, standardized policies, compliance controls, and accountability measures. Our frameworks ensure data accuracy, consistency, regulatory compliance, and transparency across departments and systems.

faqs.question: Can Iseyon implement Master Data Management (MDM) solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, Iseyon designs and deploys MDM frameworks that create a single, trusted source of truth for critical entities such as customers, products, and suppliers. Our solutions reduce duplication, improve consistency, and enhance collaboration across business units.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon ensure data quality, security, and compliance?
faqs.answer: Iseyon implements data profiling, cleansing, validation, metadata management, lineage tracking, encryption, and role-based access controls to ensure high data quality and enterprise-grade security. Our approach supports audit readiness, regulatory compliance, and secure data operations across cloud and on-premise environments.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon support cloud, hybrid, and legacy data modernization?
faqs.answer: Iseyon designs scalable data architectures that integrate seamlessly across cloud, hybrid, and on-premise systems. We modernize legacy data platforms, automate workflows, optimize storage through lifecycle management policies, and improve performance -- creating a future-ready, cost-efficient data management ecosystem.
